历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 3232 → 3332 → 2043 → 1180 → 961, showing a continuous and significant upward trend (ranking numbers decreasing year by year), with a cumulative advance of about 2271 positions over the past 4 years, and a 2025 baseline of about 961, indicating extremely high application popularity; the university's enrollment plan for science/physics category in Henan Province: 2021: 90 → 2022: 85 → 2023: 67 → 2024: 57 → 2025: 37, decreasing year by year; the 2026 plan is 62, a significant expansion of about 67.6% compared to 2025, which is beneficial for alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 12th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (Top 20), with stable rankings in the 11–16 range in recent years, belonging to the top domestic engineering strong schools; the 2026 reputation evaluation is neutral/mixed, with no major negative public opinion; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 10th (high heat), with high short video exposure, reflecting continuously rising application attention; in 2024, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (medium attention), but no obvious gaps were recorded in 2025–2026; the fifth round of discipline evaluation has 17 disciplines rated A- or above, including Mechanics A+, Mechanical Engineering A+, Materials Science and Engineering A+, Environmental Science and Engineering A+, Computer Science and Technology A, Control Science and Engineering A, etc., with extremely outstanding engineering strength, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation were all highly recommended/recommended in 2024–2026, with sustained high social popularity; the total number of candidates in Henan Province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 1.2 million, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025 (about 907,000), intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province (Northeast China), far from Henan Province, with some regional preference impact; the university's enrollment proportion in its own province (Heilongjiang) is extremely high (about 62–67%), while in Henan it is about 1–2%, belonging to out-of-province enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous and significant upward trend in historical rankings (extremely high application popularity), the significant 67.6% expansion in 2026 (alleviating competition), the approximately 32% increase in total candidates (intensifying competition), and the university's top-tier level and high-heat major attractiveness, the expansion effect, rising popularity, and candidate growth offset each other. Therefore, the predicted minimum ranking for the 2026 science/physics category is about 1351, with a range of 1197–1505.

HIT's flexible major selection mechanism within the class allows priority selection of popular directions such as Computer Science, Artificial Intelligence, and Automation.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for liberal arts/history category were approximately 1610 → 5617 → 1451 → (no data for 2024) → 1037, with significant fluctuations; an abnormal gap occurred in 2022 (5617), rebounded to 1451 in 2023, and further advanced to 1047 in 2025, showing an overall forward trend in recent 3 years, with a baseline of about 1047 in 2025; the enrollment plan for liberal arts/history category in Henan Province: 14 in 2021 → 19 in 2022 → 10 in 2023 → 8 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 8, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 12th in 2026 Shanghai Ranking (Top 20), a top domestic university with brand appeal to liberal arts candidates; reputation evaluation in 2026 is neutral/mixed; Douyin popularity ranking 10th (high heat), overall high exposure; no abnormal admission records for liberal arts; although mainly engineering, disciplines like Management Science and Engineering (A), Business Administration (related) are strong, supporting liberal arts enrollment majors.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts-related majors such as Economics and Management, Law is divided: wait-and-see/recommended; total number of examinees in Henan Province for 2026 college entrance exam is about 1.2 million, an increase of about 32% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; Harbin Institute of Technology is located in Heilongjiang Province, far from Henan, and only offers one major category for liberal arts enrollment: Economics and Management Experimental Class (including Business Administration, Accounting, Architecture, Urban and Rural Planning, Law, etc.), with narrow choices, which may affect some candidates' willingness to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations but recent forward trend, unchanged enrollment plan, increase in total examinees, and the top-tier level of the university, based on the 2025 baseline of 1047, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category in 2026 is predicted to be about 1037, with a range of 918–1156.
